creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have to admit that I test a lot on IPv6 but I haven't set a static address in the Lab anywhere it seems;  I'll give it a try.  I assume there is a down/up cycle and missing some cleanup somewhere (as you said you tried a netif restart instead of using wpa_cli to switch the network back).

The issue after reboot is an issue we are tracking on 8xxx/9xxx cards and this is now the 2nd report on an AX2xx as well.

So likely both parts are known at this point;  I'll leave the PR open and hope not to forget to mention it for fixes in commit messages.
